A remote attacker could exploit this vulnerability by sending an HTTP GET request containing multipart/form-data content. If the underlying application processes parameters using methods like `getParameterMap()`, the server prematurely parses and stores this content to disk. This could lead to resource exhaustion, potentially resulting in a Denial of Service (DoS).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00441, "percentile": 0.3507}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-3x3v-w654-m28m", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-03-27T20:45:48Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3x3v-w654-m28m", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-3x3v-w654-m28m"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-3260"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-03-24T05:16:24Z", "published_at": "2026-03-24T06:31:13Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-3260", "https://access.redhat.com/security/cve/CVE-2026-3260", "https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=2443010", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3x3v-w654-m28m"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/undertow-io/undertow", "summary": "Undertow: Denial of Service via Multipart/Form-Data Parsing on HTTP GET Requests", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-30T21:23:43Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-3x3v-w654-m28m", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "io.undertow:undertow-core"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.4.0.Beta1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
